metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Billy Joel - The Longest Time.flac
metadata.title: The Longest Time
metadata.lyrics:
[00:01.59] Whoa-oh-oh (for the longest-)
[00:05.02] For the longest time
[00:08.80] Whoa-oh-oh (for the longest-)
[00:11.62] For the longest-
[00:13.19] If you said goodbye to me tonight
[00:19.06] There would still be music left to write
[00:25.12] What else could I do? I'm so inspired by you
[00:30.93] That hasn't happened for the longest time
[00:36.35] Once I thought my innocence was gone
[00:41.80] Now I know that happiness goes on
[00:48.01] That's where you found me when you put your arms around me
[00:54.04] I haven't been there for the longest time
[00:59.30] Whoa-oh-oh (for the longest-)
[01:03.44] For the longest time
[01:06.42] Whoa-oh-oh (for the longest-)
[01:09.37] For the longest time
[01:10.61] I'm that voice you're hearing in the hall
[01:16.33] And the greatest miracle of all
[01:22.72] Is how I need you and how you needed me too
[01:28.43] That hasn't happened for the longest time
[01:33.91] Maybe this won't last very long
[01:39.24] But you feel so right and I could be wrong
[01:45.08] Maybe I've been hoping too hard
[01:50.40] But I've gone this far and it's more than I hoped for
[01:56.48] Who knows how much further we'll go on
[02:02.18] Maybe I'll be sorry when you're gone
[02:08.15] I'll take my chances, I forgot how nice romance is
[02:14.14] I haven't been there for the longest time
[02:19.50] I had second thoughts at the start
[02:24.54] I said to myself, "Hold on to your heart"
[02:30.32] Now I know the woman that you are
[02:35.49] You're wonderful so far and it's more than I hoped for
[02:41.55] I don't care what consequence it brings
[02:47.32] I have been a fool for lesser things
[02:53.32] I want you so bad, I think you ought to know that
[02:58.64] I intend to hold you for the longest time
[03:04.28] Whoa-oh-oh (for the longest-)
[03:08.54] For the longest time
[03:11.58] Whoa-oh-oh (for the longest-)
[03:14.34] For the longest time
[03:17.14] Whoa, oh-oh (for the longest time)
[03:20.09] For the longest time
[03:22.69] Whoa-oh-oh (for the longest-)
[03:25.45] For the longest time
[03:28.24] Whoa, oh-oh (for the longest-)
[03:31.21] For the longest time
[03:32.73]
